decks.notes: The main idea of this deck is to generate a large number of creature tokens quickly and efficiently to overwhelm the opponent. Prossh, Skyraider of Kher serves as the commander, creating Kobold tokens whenever he enters the battlefield. The deck includes numerous mana accelerants, such as Arbor Elf and Birds of Paradise, as well as cards like Earthcraft and Eldritch Evolution to further increase token production. The deck also features various combo pieces like Purphoros, God of the Forge and Goblin Bombardment to deal direct damage to the opponent. Overall, the strategy revolves around creating an army of tokens and using them to quickly defeat the opponent before they can respond.

The main idea of this Duel Commander deck featuring Hidetsugu and Kairi is to control the game by disrupting the opponent's strategies and countering their threats. With a mix of removal spells, counterspells, and card advantage engines like Snapcaster Mage and Mystic Sanctuary, the deck aims to maintain a strong board presence while controlling the pace of the game. By utilizing powerful spells such as Demonic Tutor, Cryptic Command, and Time Stretch, the deck can quickly turn the tide in its favor and overwhelm the opponent. With access to a variety of utility lands like Phyrexian Tower and Urborg, Tomb of Yawgmoth, as well as flexible cards like Agna Qel'a and Sauron's Ransom, the deck is well-equipped to handle a wide range of situations and emerge victorious.

The deck is centered around a fast, aggressive playstyle with a focus on controlling the board and disrupting the opponent's strategy. It includes a mix of low-cost creatures and versatile instant spells to quickly establish dominance on the battlefield. The Commander, Aragorn, King of Gondor, provides a strong and resilient leader for the deck, boosting the effectiveness of the other creatures and spells. With a strong mana base and a variety of powerful cards like Swords to Plowshares and Teferi, Time Raveler, the deck aims to outpace the opponent and maintain control of the game through a combination of aggression and disruption.

The deck focuses on a combination of aggressive creatures and powerful spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent in a fast-paced 1 vs 1 format. By utilizing the partnership of Kraum and Yoshimaru, the deck aims to maintain card advantage and flexibility in its game plan. With a mix of efficient creatures like Adeline, Kari Zev, and Arbaaz Mir, supported by removal spells such as Lightning Bolt and Swords to Plowshares, the deck can apply constant pressure while disrupting the opponent's strategy. Additionally, the inclusion of powerful equipment like Embercleave and Skullclamp enhances the deck's threat level and provides additional ways to gain advantage in combat.

The main focus of this deck is to control the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy through a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and card draw. Glarb, Calamity's Augur serves as the commander, providing card advantage and the ability to manipulate the top of the deck. The deck includes a mix of efficient removal spells like Fatal Push and Dismember, along with powerful counterspells like Cryptic Command and Mana Leak to keep the opponent's threats in check. Card draw spells such as Brainstorm and Serum Visions help maintain card advantage and find key pieces of the deck. Overall, the strategy revolves around disruption, card advantage, and controlling the game until you can secure a victory.

The deck focuses on a fast and aggressive playstyle, utilizing the combination of Slimefoot and Squee as commanders to provide resilience and consistency. The deck includes a mix of efficient removal spells, mana ramp, and powerful creatures to pressure opponents and maintain board presence. The deck also incorporates various synergies such as sacrificing creatures for value with Goblin Bombardment and utilizing Squee's ability to repeatedly cast spells from the graveyard. The goal is to overwhelm opponents with a relentless assault, while using the commander's abilities to generate incremental advantage and close out the game quickly. The deck is built to apply early pressure and maintain a strong presence throughout the game.

The deck focuses on controlling the game by utilizing a wide array of counterspells, removal spells, and hand disruption to disrupt the opponent's game plan. Tasigur, the Golden Fang serves as the commander to provide card advantage and graveyard recursion. The deck also includes powerful card draw engines like Brainstorm, Ponder, and Opt to ensure a consistent stream of spells. With a mix of efficient removal options like Fatal Push and Abrupt Decay, alongside versatile counterspells such as Cryptic Command and Force of Negation, the deck aims to keep the opponent on the back foot while steadily building its own resources. By maintaining control of the board and hand, the deck aims to outvalue and outlast the opponent in the long game.

The deck focuses on controlling the game through a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and card advantage. Tasigur, the Golden Fang serves as the commander, providing card advantage and recursion. The deck includes a variety of counter spells like Counterspell, Force of Negation, and Mystic Confluence to control the opponent's plays. Removal like Fatal Push, Abrupt Decay, and Drown in the Loch help deal with threats on the board. Card draw spells such as Brainstorm, Opt, and Gitaxian Probe provide card advantage. Additionally, the deck includes tutors like Demonic Tutor and Tainted Pact to find key pieces. Overall, the deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy while maintaining card advantage to win the game.
